chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2643 - وَ سَأَلَهُ يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ شُعَيْبٍ : عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَكُونُ بِهِ اَلْقَرْحَةُ يَرْبِطُهَا أَوْ يُعَصِّبُهَا بِخِرْقَةٍ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2643 - Ya'qub ibn Shu'ayb asked Imam (as) about a Muhrim who has a wound. Can he bind it or wrap it with a cloth?
Imam (as) said: "Yes."
